title: Ubiquiti RPS-AC-100W, Redundant Power Supply AC/DC, 100W
description: The RPS-AC-100W is a 100W power supply and is designed for Ubiquiti units designed for 19" rack with removable power supplies. In case of failure of the primary source, the unit detects an error and the power automatically switch to the second power source UF-OLT (Ubiquiti UFiber OLT) USG-XG-8 (UniFi Security Gateway) ER-8-XG (EdgeRouter Infinity) GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
